name: ZeroTier
description: Peer-to-peer mesh VPN — join your node to a ZeroTier network and reach it securely from anywhere.
compose:
name: "slashnode-zerotier"
services:
  zerotier:
    image: "zerotier/zerotier:1.14.2"
    container_name: "zerotier"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    network_mode: "host"
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
    devices:
      - "/dev/net/tun"
    volumes:
      - "zerotier-data:/var/lib/zerotier-one"
volumes:
  zerotier-data:
    name: "slashnode-zerotier_zerotier_zerotier-data"
notes: ZeroTier mesh-VPN client. It runs in host network mode and needs the NET_ADMIN capability and /dev/net/tun to manage the VPN tunnel — it is not behind Caddy/Tor. Open the zerotier console and run `zerotier-cli join <network-id>` to join a network, then authorize this node in your ZeroTier Central account. Check status with `zerotier-cli status` / `zerotier-cli listnetworks`.
